commit.message:
Rename `Clickable` to `Touchable` (#4063)

## Description

`Clickable` was initial name for our new component, but we all agreed
that this name is not the best. Since `Touchable` was basically free -
it was used with suffixes, like `TouchableOpacity`, we decided to rename
`Clickable` to `Touchable`

## Test plan

`yarn ts-check` and `yarn lint-js`

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Hero design refresh: diagonal pattern, subtle Konami deco, choreographed entrance

1. Break the grid above the fold: Added a diagonal SVG architectural
   pattern (hero-pattern) positioned to extend from the hero section
   into the first row of cards. Uses radial gradient mask for fade,
   with subtle intersection nodes. Hidden at mobile widths.

2. Rethink Konami glyph treatment: Replaced inline debug-looking
   glyph text with a vertical decorative element (hero-konami-deco)
   running down the left margin at 10% opacity. Removed the old
   hero-kicker::before rule. Konami easter egg overlay unaffected.

3. Signature page-load animation: Hero elements now animate with a
   choreographed entrance sequence triggered immediately (not on
   scroll): kicker slides from left (0ms), Konami deco fades (200ms),
   diagonal pattern fades (150ms), headline slides up 32px (300ms),
   description slides up (500ms). Grid cards still cascade via
   IntersectionObserver. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: stable YouTube streaming with cross-platform mic input (#16)

* feat: stable YouTube streaming with cross-platform mic input

- Replace frame-rate-limiting FramePacer with a dedicated StreamingThread
  that uses coarse sleep + spin-wait for sub-millisecond timing accuracy,
  decoupling display loop speed from stream delivery entirely
- Add AudioCapture class: captures system default mic via sounddevice and
  serves raw PCM over a local TCP socket that ffmpeg reads from — works on
  Windows, macOS, and Linux without hardcoding any device names
- Fall back to platform-native audio (avfoundation/pulse/dshow) if
  sounddevice is not installed, with a clear install message
- Add -tune zerolatency to cut encoder-side latency to near zero
- Add -thread_queue_size 512 and -rtbufsize 100M to prevent silent audio
  packet drops when mixing pipe video with live audio capture
- Fix Python-level pipe buffering (bufsize=0 + explicit flush) that was
  causing frames to arrive at ffmpeg in large bursts
- Add -flvflags no_duration_filesize to avoid FLV metadata buffering
- Reduce bufsize to 2x bitrate for tighter CBR (was 6x)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update write_frame() shim to support Streamer for backward compat

commit.message:
PR-4: Wire regime engine adapter — replace stub with real computed RegimeOutput (#111)

* Initial plan

* feat: PR-4 regime engine adapter with assessment context and tests

- Add backend/app/services/regime_engine.py: RegimeEngine class mapping
  deduction/forecast engine outputs to RegimeOutput schema. All 6 regime
  states producible; all metric outputs bounded [0.0, 1.0]; forecast
  implication uses no raw model notation.
- Add backend/app/services/assessment_context.py: fetch_assessment_context()
  helper that builds context dict from mechanism labels and ontology forecast
  for a given assessment_id.
- Update backend/app/api/routes/assessments.py: GET /regime now calls
  RegimeEngine with real context; falls back to stub on error or missing context.
- Update backend/app/services/analysis_service.py: perform_deduction() now
  emits regime_metrics dict as a side-effect alongside deduction output.
- Add tests/test_regime_engine.py: 66 unit tests covering all acceptance
  criteria (regime taxonomy, metric bounds, language rules, end-to-end).

commit.message:
fix(crawlers): add canton inference + KSGR workflow + data cleanup

- Add inferAnyCanton() call in hardenJobsRichResultsData to auto-detect
  canton from location/addressLocality for jobs missing the canton field.
  Uses full BFS municipality data for all 26 cantons (not just target).

- Fix inferAnyCanton() in target-swiss-locations.mjs to use
  isCantonRelevant() (which checks BFS municipalities) for non-target
  cantons, instead of only checking SWISS_CANTONS.names.

- Create .github/workflows/update-jobs-ksgr.yml for Kantonsspital
  Graubünden (had runner + parser but no workflow).

- Clean 129 jobs across 7 crawler slices with inferred canton:
  pwc (104→ZH/BE/etc), denner (11→BL/AG/SG/TG/VD), alpiq (2→VD/SO),
  efg-international (1→GR), groupe-mutuel (5→AG/VD/SG)

- Remaining 44 without canton are genuinely un-inferrable:
  Lonza 'CH' (40, country-level), Colin-Cie 'Munsbach' (3, Luxembourg),
  Groupe Mutuel 'Suisse' (1, country-level)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: implement CostAwareSampler (Flow2 cost-aware categorical optimization)

Add CostAwareSampler implementing ISampler with FLAML Flow2-based cost-aware
optimization for categorical search spaces. Features:
- Adaptive step sizing: grows on improvement, shrinks on stagnation
- Cost-aware penalty: expensive trials trigger additional step shrinkage
- User-customizable cost projection via Func<TrialCost, double>
- Convergence detection after sustained stagnation
- Internal Flow2Categorical for discretized local search with sphere sampling
- Internal SearchThread for step adaptation and cost tracking

Includes 31 tests covering constructor validation, ISampler contract,
cost projection customization, step sizing, convergence, backward
compatibility, determinism, categorical discretization, and factory pattern.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix doc PR auto-merge: add delay and 3-attempt retry

Document PRs (Research, PMSpec, Architecture) are meant to auto-merge
after the agent commits content. The merge was silently failing because
GitHub hadn't processed the commit yet. Added 3s initial delay and
3-attempt retry with exponential backoff.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
security: fix AV33 pool self-award in validate_pool_distribution

Add Step 3b winner identity check to validate_pool_distribution:
- Track first wallet paid per tier in tier_winner HashMap
- Compute fairness_map from on-chain blocks_without_reward history
  (deterministic across all validators, no gossip dependency)
- After amount tolerance check, verify the paid wallet matches the
  expected fairness-rotation winner (highest blocks_without_reward/10,
  address-ascending tie-break)
- Bitmap drift guard: only enforce when actual winner appears in our
  decoded bitmap nodes, preventing false positives from Free-tier churn
- UTXO-enforcement redirect accepted when collateral_utxo_tier_map
  confirms the actual payout address belongs to the correct tier
- Tied candidates (same fairness_bonus) are all accepted as valid

Without this check a modified producer could self-award the Silver,
Bronze, or Gold pool every block. All validator nodes accepted the
block because the total amount per tier was correct. Confirmed active
exploitation observed on mainnet (blocks 1314, 1317-1325).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Phase112: Dropbox OAuth 2.0 PKCE フロー実装（バックエンド層） (#120)

* feat: Phase112 - Dropbox OAuth 2.0 PKCE フロー実装（バックエンド層）

- IDropboxOAuthService / DropboxOAuthService: PKCE (S256) + 固定ポート 54321-54325 + フォールバック
- DropboxTokenResult / DropboxRefreshResult / DropboxOAuthException (ErrorCode, IsTokenExpired)
- DropboxStorageProvider: ICredentialStore + IDropboxOAuthService コンストラクタ追加
- EnsureAccessTokenAsync: Credential Store からの遅延ロード（非同期化）
- RefreshAccessTokenAsync: PKCE リフレッシュパス追加（失効時トークン削除 + DropboxOAuthException）
- DownloadStreamAsync を async に変換
- DropboxOAuthServiceTests: 14 件追加

Closes #112 (partial - UI レイヤーは #113 で完成)
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: PR #120 レビュー指摘対応 + テスタビリティ向上

- BuildRedirectUri: trailing slash を追加 (HttpListener.Prefix と一致)
- listener.Stop() → listener.Close() (リソースリーク修正)
- 認可 URL ログから state を除去 (セキュリティ: AuthorizeEndpoint のみ記録)
- RefreshTokenAsync/ExchangeCodeAsync: response を using var で確実 Dispose
- ParseCallbackQuery を internal static 純関数として抽出 (テスタビリティ向上)
- DropboxStorageProvider: ICredentialStore 全メソッドへ CancellationToken 伝播
- AssemblyInfo.cs 追加: InternalsVisibleTo(CloudMigrator.Tests.Unit)
- テスト: 例外アサーション ThrowAsync<DropboxOAuthException>().Where(ErrorCode=token_not_found) に変更
- テスト: ParseCallbackQuery/GenerateCodeVerifier/GenerateCodeChallenge/BuildRedirectUri/BuildAuthorizationUrl の純関数テスト追加

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: PR #120 第2ラウンドレビュー対応

- AuthorizeAsync: Process.Start でブラウザ起動（authUrl 未使用によるタイムアウトバグ修正）
- RefreshTokenAsync/ExchangeCodeAsync: body 変数をログに含めて未使用警告を解消
- StartListener: HttpListenerException のエラーコード識別を追加（ポート競合のみフォールバック、権限不足等は即時再スロー）
- BuildRedirectUri/BuildAuthorizationUrl: private static → internal static に昇格
- RefreshAccessTokenAsync: App Key 未登録時の InvalidOperationException を DropboxOAuthException(token_not_found) に統一
- DropboxOAuthException: IsTokenExpired のコメントを「再認証が必要」に修正
- DropboxStorageProvider: EnsureTokenLoadedAsync コメントを EnsureAccessTokenAsync に修正
- TestHelper: リフレクション呼び出しを直接呼び出しに変更+コメント修正

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: PR #120 第3ラウンドレビュー対応

- AuthorizeAsync: Process.Start を try ブロック内に移動し、失敗時も listener.Close() が確実に実行されるよう修正
- StartListener: 非ポート競合の HttpListenerException 時に listener を Close して DropboxOAuthException にラップ（URLACL 未登録・権限不足等の原因を InnerException で伝達）

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: implement full deauth + beacon spam attack suite

- Firmware v1.5.0-offensive: add DEAUTH_START/STOP and BEACON_START/STOP
  commands using raw 802.11 frame injection via esp_wifi_80211_tx()
- Deauth sends broadcast deauth frames ~200/sec with configurable count
- Beacon spam broadcasts up to 50 fake APs with random MACs at 10/sec
- Mode conflicts auto-resolved (starting one attack stops conflicting modes)
- OffensiveTab: replace 'Coming Soon' placeholder with full UI
  - Deauth card: AP picker from live scan, frame count, start/stop
  - Beacon spam card: prefix input, count, channel, start/stop
  - Mutual exclusion between all three attack modes
- Home.tsx: pass scanResults into OffensiveTab for AP targeting

commit.message:
fix: rebuild 3 fabricated per-patient tables in retrospective-validation report

EXP-1901: All 11 rows replaced with correct JSON data (ISF values,
  concordances, evidence counts all wrong). Lowest concordance patients
  corrected: b,k,i → j,e,a.

EXP-1903: All 10 rows replaced. Outlier patient: k(71.3%) → b(70.6%).
  Drift patient: k(p=0.052) → d(p=0.009). Mean CV excl outlier:
  4.6% → 11.8%.

EXP-1907: All 11 rows replaced. Outlier patient: k(56.3%) → b(39.1%).
  Mean CV excl outlier: 4.8% → 6.5%.

EXP-1909: Train TIR values corrected (±0.6-2.3pp deviations), patient h
  ISF ratio 2.57→2.53, mean |Δ TIR| 2.1→2.6pp.

Also: header 1,838→~1,640 patient-days, clinical ISF 40→115 → 25→72.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- All 8 acceptance criteria met (100% coverage)
- 57 tests implemented (50 component/hook + 7 design token QA)
- Production-ready: FormField, Textarea, useFormValidation hook, validators
- Design tokens DTCG-compliant, accessibility standards met

redesign: M365 Roadmap — Mission Control dashboard identity

commit.message:
Rename sovereign-auth to agc-auth-helper across all files

Update all references from the legacy name (sovereign-auth / soverign-auth)
to the new repository name (agc-auth-helper):

- docs/_config.yml: baseurl, title, GitHub link, footer (fixes GitHub Pages)
- package.json / package-lock.json: package name
- src/index.ts: healthz service name
- test/: matching assertions and comments
- infra/: Bicep, ARM JSON, and parameter defaults
- docs/: clone URLs, path examples, resource group names, GitHub links
- .squad/: team metadata and config
